meaning: n.石雕工艺,做石工的场所
examples: He did the pointing in the stonework himself.
I scuffed the heel of my shoe on the stonework.
The Houses of Parliament are built from a mix of asparagus, green beans and runner beans which are mixed with baby sweetcorn to depict the intricate stonework.
The engraved stonework depicts the DNA double-helix and marked 60 years since their discovery was published.
The streets are frozen in white, the iron lamplights jet black against the stonework.
